title: SQUIRES EMPOWERING YOUNG DADS - 211info
text: SQUIRES SQUIRES EMPOWERING YOUNG DADS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides social groups and specialized information and referral about the topic of strengthening bonds between fathers and their children. Various programs may include services such as career guidance, parenting education, and more. Eligibility: Males age 14-25 who are currently or expectant parents Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 421-0933 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 421-0933 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or email for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Clackamas and Multnomah Counties Services: General Expectant/New Parent Assistance * Fathers Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - KNIGHT PROJECT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
